info.description: Web services to manage Sellable Item objects from 3DPortfolio service.
info.title: Sellable Item Web Services

post.description: Create Sellable Item with its first Version. A model is mandatory at the creation and non modifiable after.

400.description: Bad request:The format of the request is not correct.

get.description: Get all the Sellable Items accessible to the user

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of Sellable Items to skip. Default value is 0.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of Sellable Items to fetch. Default is 50 and max is 1000.

patch.description: Update the attribute values of a Sellable Item

parameters.name: IF-MATCH
parameters.description: The entity tag (etag) value that should me matched for a successful update.

400.description: Bad request:The format of the request is not correct.

patch.description: Add or remove Sellable Items in the Sellable Item. Use this API to manage bundles of sellable items.

parameters.name: IF-MATCH
parameters.description: The entity tag (etag) value that should me matched for a successful update.

type.description: Should be dscpfl:SellableItem if it is not of the custom type.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the Sellable Item.

type.description: Should be dscpfl:SellableItem if it is not of the custom type.

message.example: Only Sellable Items are allowed.

412.description: The passed If-Match header doesn't match the current etag value.

@code.description: Error code.

message.example: You don't have the last version of the Sellable Item.

get.summary: Get Sales Experiences of a Sellable Item
get.description: Get Sales Experiences of a Sellable Item. Results can be filtered using location, market and channel query parameters.

identifier.description: ID of the Sales Experience.

relativePath.description: Relative path of the Sales Experience.

location.description: Target Locations for the Sales Experience.

channel.description: Target Channels for the Sales Experience.

market.description: Target Markets for the Sales Experience.

400.description: Bad request:The format of the request is not correct.

post.description: Set Governing Project of the Sellable Item. If a governing project is already set, it will be replaced.

identifier.description: The ds6w:resourceUid of the Project accessible in the federated search.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the project.

identifier.description: The ds6w:resourceUid of the Project accessible in the federated search.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the item only if it is a Sellable Item.

post.description: Remove Governing Project of the Sellable Item

get.description: Get Governing Project of the Sellable Item

identifier.description: The ds6w:resourceUid of the Project accessible in the federated search.

relativePath.description: The relative path to the Project.

post.summary: Set main content of a sellable item
post.description: Set main content of a sellable item. Only objects of type Model Version, Product Configuration and Base Configuration can be set as main content.

parameters.name: IF-MATCH
parameters.description: The entity tag (etag) value that should me matched for a successful update.

identifier.description: The physical id of the main content.

type.description: The type of the main content.

source.description: The source URL of the main content

relativePath.description: The relative path of the main content.

identifier.description: The physical id of the main content.

type.description: The type of the main content.

source.description: The source URL of the main content

relativePath.description: The relative path of the main content.

400.description: Bad request:The format of the request is not correct.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Model Version, Product Configuration and Base Configuration are the only types allowed for main content.

patch.summary: Add or Remove Sellable Item prices
patch.description: Add or Remove List Prices of a Sellable Item. Removing a list price will delete it, as a List Price cannot exist outside of a Sellable Item.

parameters.name: IF-MATCH
parameters.description: The entity tag (etag) value that should me matched for a successful update.

locations.description: Target Locations for this List Price.

channels.description: Target Channels for this List Price.

identifier.description: The physical id of the variant or the option group.

type.description: The type of the variant or the option group.

title.description: The title of the variant or the option group.

source.description: The source of the variant or the option group.

relativePath.description: The relative path of the variant or the option group.

sequenceNumber.description: The sequence number of the variant/option group in the base configuration.

status.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The status of the Parameter in the Base Configuration.

isCumulative.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The Parameter Pricing is Cumulative or not.

minValue.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The minimum value of the Parameter range.

maxValue.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The maximum value of the Parameter range.

prices.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The ranges and their prices.

minValue.description: The minimum limit of the specific range.

maxValue.description: The maximum limit of the specific range.

isFixed.description: The price for this range is fixed or varies by the quantity

quantity.description: The quantity multiplier for variable price.

features.description: (For Variant or Variability Group ONLY) The Values/Options associated.

identifier.description: The physical id of the feature.

source.description: The source URL of the variant value or the option.

relativePath.description: The relative path of a variant value or an option.

status.description: The status of the feature in the Base Configuration.

amount.description: The amount of the feature price.

400.description: Bad request:The format of the request is not correct.

get.description: Get prices of a Sellable Item. Results can be filtered using location and currency query parameters.

identifier.description: URI of list price.

relativePath.description: Relative path of list price.

currency.description: The default currency of List Price.

location.description: Target Locations for this List Price.

channel.description: Target Channels for this List Price.

message.example: List Price URI is missing in your request.

channels.description: Target Channels for this List Price.

identifier.description: The physical id of the feature.

source.description: The source URL of the variant value or the option.

relativePath.description: The relative path of a variant value or an option.

status.description: The status of the feature in the Base Configuration.

isCumulative.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The Parameter Pricing is Cumulative or not.

minValue.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The minimum value of the Parameter range.

maxValue.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The maximum value of the Parameter range.

amount.description: The amount of the feature price.

minValue.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The minimum limit of the specific range.

maxValue.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The maximum limit of the specific range.

isFixed.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The price for this range is fixed or varies by the quantity

quantity.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The quantity multiplier for variable price.

unit.description: (For Variant Parameter ONLY) The Parameter unit.

xmlHttpRequestHeader.name: X-Requested-With
xmlHttpRequestHeader.description: Required header. The value is XMLHttpRequest.

securityContextHeader.name: SecurityContext
securityContextHeader.description: Required header. Security context of the logged in user.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Location reference should have these properties : id, type, source.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Channel reference should have these properties : id, type, source.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Market reference should have these properties : id, type, source.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: An entity with ID "lcc-3166-1:FRANCE" does not exist. Please verify.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Sellable Item should have either all the targeted locations/channels of the associated List Prices or no value set. FRA, IND.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: List Price should have one of the target locations/channels of the parent Sellable Item or no value. IND, FRA.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Operation cannot be done as a List Price with the same Currency, Locations and Channels already exists.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: The status of the feature 750955C260008F2C does not allow edition of the price.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Operation cannot be done as the SellableItem is not in Draft/In work State.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Each Feature reference should have these properties : identifier, title, type, source, relativePath, status.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Minimum and maximum value for the parameter is not provided.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: The feature 750955C260008F2C is missing parameters or is in incorrect format : isCumulative, isFixed, minValue, maxValue.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: The List Price is not associated to a Sellable Item. Please try again with correct details.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: The Variant Values, ED148A6BCA892 and 5FFF874A8D are of same variant.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: The status of the feature ABED148A6BCA8925FFF874A8A is incorrect.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: The Variability Option ABED148A6BCA8925FFF874A8A is not a feature present in the Base Configuration.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: The List Price Id is Invalid. Please try again with correct details.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Sellable Item URI is missing in your request.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: The Sellable Item Id is Invalid. Please try again with correct details.

400.description: Bad request:The format of the request is not correct.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Sellable Item URI is missing in your request.

@code.description: Error code : Can be http code or custom app code.

message.example: Operation cannot be done as the Sellable Item is not in Private/In work State.

412.description: The passed If-Match header doesn't match the current etag value.

@code.description: Error code.

message.example: You don't have the last version of the portfolio version.
